message:
feat: Add partial WITH RECURSIVE support

- Add is_recursive field to CTEDef struct
- Detect RECURSIVE keyword during CTE parsing
- Implement materializeRecursiveCTE for basic recursive CTEs
- Handle base case with literal values (e.g., SELECT 1 as n)
- Execute recursive case iteratively until no new rows
- Support multiple columns in recursive CTEs

The implementation works for simple recursive sequences but complex
expressions like factorial calculation (factorial * (n + 1)) require
nested expression parsing which is not yet supported.

Test results improved from 94 passed/6 failed to 95 passed/4 failed.
